subject: Fermi GBM-190816: Correction from the Zwicky Transient Facility
body:
In GCN # 25430, four transient were reported. For one of these, ZTF19abqykei, also known as AT2019obh, the position given was incorrect. A negative sign was missing from the declination.  The correct position should be:
---------------------------------------
  ZTF Name     | RA (deg) | DEC (deg)  
----------------------------------------
 ZTF19abqykei  | 69.0926074 | -10.3722396 
We apologise for any inconvenience caused.
